text:
>
> Basically it means replacing that `grep -q "^${PORTSDIR}"` with `grep -q "^/"`.
>

That's the way I wrote it first but I thought it wouldn't be accepted,
I'll resend a new version of the patch. (I have also seen that I
missed some place the add ${PORTSDIR}) so just wait for the new patch
before testing (that should be done tomorrow)

regards,
Bapt
